description: The fetchClerkKey function in useEffect has no try/catch around the fetch call's .json() parsing, which will crash if the response is not valid JSON. Wrap the entire fetch block in try/catch and handle JSON parsing errors separately.
successCriteria: The fetch and .json() calls are wrapped in a single try/catch block
JSON parsing errors set clerkError state with a user-friendly message
The error handling preserves the existing retry logic
